title: Thelypteris subintegra
taxonomy: Thelypteris subintegra is classified within the family Thelypteridaceae. This plant belongs to the genus Thelypteris, a group of ferns. It is a species of fern, specifically a type of deciduous or evergreen fern native to Central and South America. The genus Thelypteris is part of the larger group of polypod ferns. Thelypteris subintegra is a species of terrestrial fern, growing in shaded and humid environments.
